register.note: the lab grammar holds — teal=selected/live, blue=the gradient/model arrow matching the blue grad readout, amber/slate as a legitimate elevation ramp (no all-red error dilution), and prose terms pair the darkened viz-ink hue with underline — as consistently held as the green/blue class split in r2d3-trees/00-viewport.png.

hero.note: needs a wide ambient specimen portrait (per DESIGN.md / LinearRegressionHero) of the contour landscape with the gradient arrow standing on it, smoothly rendered with one explanatory load-motion, so the page has a poster-worthy face instead of an empty masthead void.

assessment.note: the experiment is genuinely playable (drag the point) and every Check option gets process feedback, but the 06 TRANSFER item is a three-row MCQ with no interaction or open prompt.

blocking: Add a wide specimen hero before the masthead — an ambient contour-landscape portrait with the gradient arrow on it, one explanatory load-motion, no readouts — so the exhibit has a poster-worthy protagonist (currently absent; forces hero dims to 0).
Re-render the contour landscape anti-aliased (it is visibly stair-stepped/pixel-blocky at native resolution) so the page's focal object reaches the Distill/Ciechanowski smoothness bar.

Tag the arrow in-figure (label it grad-f and mark the right angle where it crosses a contour) so the canvas self-documents instead of leaning on adjacent prose, per distill-momentum's per-panel captions.
